projectName: ZK-Reasoning Ledger: Privacy-Preserving Agent Logic Verification
hackathon: AI Trading Agents ERC-8004 | Lablab.ai | $55,000 SURGE token | Deadline April 12 2026
description: This project builds a ZK-Verified Reasoning Ledger where autonomous trading agents submit proofs that their decision-making process adhered to predefined risk policies (e.g., 'max drawdown < 5%') without revealing the actual LLM prompts, model weights, or trading strategy. Unlike NeuroVault (model integrity) or VeriFlow (workflow execution), this focuses on the *semantic correctness* of the agent's internal logic. The system uses a custom Circom circuit to hash the agent's reasoning trace (gener
angle: First system to generate Zero-Knowledge Proofs of an AI agent's *reasoning chain* (not just outcome) to verify policy compliance without exposing proprietary strategy logic.
